name: AKBELEK
note: "Ivan Aplevich from Rostov-na-Donu allegedly bought Bassar and Akbelek in Turkmenistan from Ashir Lalakov. However, strangely enough, there are photos of Bassar taken at Lalakov's house, but none of Akbelek. I spoke with Ivan Aplevich, who sold Akbelek to Igor Melnichenko of Kirovograd, and I asked him MANY times where he got Akbelek. First he told me from Tajikistan, then he told me from Mary in Turkmenistan...he never gave me a precise answer. He also didn't want to tell me who her alleged owner was, because he knows I can verify it. Ashir Lalakov, who sold Bassar to Ivan Aplevich, told me that he never knew this female Akbelek." Testimony of a Russian breed expert and breeder

name: AKTASH
note: "I will try to clarify the origin of the male named Aktash. I brought him from the mountain regions of Uzbekistan, from the city of Jizzakh, but he arrived there from the city of Kerkici, Turkmenistan. (...). Fate decreed that Aktash would be taken by Lidiya Dyadichkina from Novokuznetsk." Alik Yanathanov, Almaty
